title: Enhanced Crops X Rain Growth
description: This plugin enhances your farming experience with useful features such as a rain boost that accelerates the growth of your plants.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48df393162e5fb369baa2886f5dd036d6f539281.png)
(Picture by textstudio.com)

This plugin enhances your farming experience with useful features such as a rain boost that accelerates the growth of your plants.

### Current Features:

- Right-click harvest: Automatically harvest and replant crops
- Left-click harvest: Perform a normal harvest without replanting
- Auto-replant drops: Crops dropped by normal harvesting will replant themselves after a short delay
- Dispenser planting: Dispensers can now plant crops
- Rain growth boost: Crops grow faster during rain

More features coming soon!
